---
title: "Anatomy of an Embargo Breach"
subtitle: "A Visual Analytics application for VAST Challenge 2026 Mini-Challenge 1"
---

Welcome to our ISSS608 Visual Analytics project.

This site documents our team's work building an interactive Shiny application
that investigates how a corporate merger embargo was broken by a team of AI
communication agents. Use the navigation bar to move through our proposal,
methodology, findings, and the application itself.

Our challenge is based on the VAST Challenge 2026 Mini-Challenge 1.

::: {.text-center style="margin-top:2rem;"}
<a href="https://zexinchen.shinyapps.io/shiny/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" role="button">Launch the GLASSBOX app</a>
:::
